title: Fast Fiction Factory Local Extraction Adapter Expansion
purpose: Local-first deterministic extraction adapter expansion that converts multiple Clockmaker raw memo fixtures into Extraction Contract payloads, validates every output through the existing zero-dependency validator, and audits source spans, source refs, review-safe defaults, visual-asset routing, and human-owned decision guards before any model/API behavior, database persistence, publishing adapter, AI video generation, production sync, or final canon decision exists.
validation_command: & { $files = @('public/review/index.html', 'tools/fff-state.mjs', 'tools/fff-extract-local.mjs', 'artifacts/artifact-manifest.json', 'artifacts/ARTIFACTS.md', 'artifacts/sample-raw-memo.md', 'artifacts/extraction-adapter-fixtures/clockmaker-sample.md', 'artifacts/extraction-adapter-fixtures/council-minutes-edge.md', 'artifacts/extraction-adapter-fixtures/observatory-ledger-edge.md', 'artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-output.json', 'artifacts/extraction-adapter-outputs/clockmaker-sample.json', 'artifacts/extraction-adapter-outputs/council-minutes-edge.json', 'artifacts/extraction-adapter-outputs/observatory-ledger-edge.json', 'artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-smoke-result.json', 'artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-expansion-smoke-result.json', 'artifacts/sample-project-state.json', 'artifacts/current-project-state.json', 'artifacts/sample-extraction-payload.json', 'artifacts/extraction-validator-smoke-result.json', 'artifacts/fff-current-review-screenshot.png', 'artifacts/fff-review-contact-sheet.png', 'docs/review/current-status.md', 'docs/review/local-extraction-adapter-expansion-review.md', 'docs/review/local-extraction-adapter-review.md', 'docs/review/extraction-validator-hardening-review.md', 'docs/review/extraction-contract-review.md', 'docs/review/freeform-review-intake.md', 'docs/data-model.md', 'scripts/operator/open_review.ps1'); $missing = $files | Where-Object { -not (Test-Path $_) }; if ($missing) { throw ('Missing files: ' + ($missing -join ', ')) }; $manifest = Get-Content artifacts/artifact-manifest.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($manifest.artifact_id -ne 'fff-local-extraction-adapter-expansion-001') { throw 'Manifest artifact id mismatch' }; if ($manifest.preserved_adapter_artifact_id -ne 'fff-local-extraction-adapter-spike-001') { throw 'Preserved adapter artifact id mismatch' }; if ($manifest.preserved_artifact_id -ne 'fff-extraction-validator-hardening-001') { throw 'Preserved validator artifact id mismatch' }; if ($manifest.review_input_mode -ne 'freeform') { throw 'Review input mode mismatch' }; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate artifacts/current-project-state.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate artifacts/sample-project-state.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction artifacts/sample-extraction-payload.json; node tools/fff-extract-local.mjs artifacts/sample-raw-memo.md artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-output.json artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-smoke-result.json; node tools/fff-extract-local.mjs --matrix artifacts/extraction-adapter-fixtures artifacts/extraction-adapter-outputs artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-expansion-smoke-result.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-output.json; Get-ChildItem artifacts/extraction-adapter-outputs -Filter *.json | ForEach-Object { node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction $_.FullName; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw ('Adapter output validation failed: ' + $_.Name) } }; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction-fixtures artifacts/extraction-negative-fixtures; $smoke = Get-Content artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-expansion-smoke-result.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not $smoke.passed) { throw 'Adapter expansion smoke failed' }; if ($smoke.aggregate.fixtureCount -ne 3 -or $smoke.aggregate.outputCount -ne 3 -or $smoke.aggregate.elementCount -ne 36) { throw 'Adapter expansion aggregate mismatch' }; if (-not $smoke.guardStatus.sourceSpanIntegrity -or -not $smoke.guardStatus.sourceRefsPresent -or -not $smoke.guardStatus.reviewSafeDefaults -or -not $smoke.guardStatus.humanAuthorityBoundaries -or -not $smoke.guardStatus.visualAssetBufferedThroughProfile -or -not $smoke.guardStatus.aggregateElementCoverage) { throw 'Adapter expansion guard mismatch' }; $html = Get-Content public/review/index.html -Raw; @('fff-local-extraction-adapter-expansion-001', 'fff-local-extraction-adapter-spike-001', 'fff-extraction-validator-hardening-001', 'fff-extraction-contract-001', 'Local extraction adapter expansion', 'artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-expansion-smoke-result.json', 'Extraction Contract', 'Claim Ledger', 'Timeline View', 'Profile/Ghost Flow', 'Toma fate', 'brass moth truth', 'Council motive') | ForEach-Object { if ($html -notmatch [regex]::Escape($_)) { throw ('Missing required Review Hub text: ' + $_) } }; @('artifacts/fff-current-review-screenshot.png', 'artifacts/fff-review-contact-sheet.png') | ForEach-Object { $item = Get-Item $_; if ($item.Length -le 0) { throw ('Empty visual artifact: ' + $_) } }; Write-Output 'Local extraction adapter expansion validation passed' }
validation_result: passed 2026-06-20T00:00:00+09:00; manifest validation command passed; current/sample project-state validation passed; sample extraction payload validation passed; single local adapter output regenerated and validated; matrix mode generated three adapter fixture outputs with 36 extracted elements, complete required element-type coverage, 27 profile candidates, 20 claim candidates, 12 timeline candidates, matched source spans, valid source refs, review-held defaults, no model/API behavior, profile-buffered visual assets, freeform review allowed, and no human-owned decision adopt suggestions; validator fixture matrix and smoke passed; Review Hub browser smoke passed with required text visible and no console errors after data favicon fix; screenshot/contact sheet regenerated and non-empty; git diff whitespace check passed; MkDocs strict build passed through uvx with the existing Material upstream warning and nav-info output for older review docs.
review_prompt_hint: Review the deterministic adapter expansion in natural language. Useful feedback can mention weak source spans, missing extraction classes, unsafe candidate routing, overconfident review status, fixture classes that should be added, or cases that should remain review debt before model/API integration.
next_action: Review adapter fixture output quality and decide whether to add more source-span edge cases or design a model/API adapter behind the same validator boundary. Keep output source-tracked, review-held by default, and blocked from auto-canon promotion.
